problem id: 16186320
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11110111 -> 11100001
  11101101 -> 10100001
  11111101 -> 10100001
  00111001 -> 00100000
  00101111 -> 11100000
  11111001 -> 00100001
  00011001 -> 00100000
  10001110 -> 11000001
  11010110 -> 11000001
  01101101 -> 10100000

query: 10110010
predicted answer: 01000001
